PostToolUse.command: bash -c "if [[ '$CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME' == 'Write' ]] || [[ '$CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME' == 'Edit' ]]; then cd 'C:\Users\admin\Desktop\OmniTrade' && if [[ '$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH' == *.go ]]; then gofmt -w '$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH' 2>> .claude/hooks/format-errors.log; elif [[ '$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH' == *.tsx ]] || [[ '$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH' == *.ts ]]; then npx prettier --write '$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH' 2>> .claude/hooks/format-errors.log; fi; fi"

bash -c "if [[ '$CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME' == 'Write' ]] || [[ '$CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME' == 'Edit' ]]; then cd 'C:\Users\admin\Desktop\OmniTrade' && if [[ '$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH' == *.go ]]; then golangci-lint run --out-format= '$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH' 2>> .claude/hooks/lint-errors.log; elif [[ '$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH' == *.tsx ]] || [[ '$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH' == *.ts ]]; then npx eslint '$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH' 2>> .claude/hooks/lint-errors.log; fi; fi"
